name: RexBots File-to-Link Bot
description: Telegram File-to-Link streaming bot with web server. Deploy and configure via environment variables.

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID from https://my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API Hash from https://my.telegram.org

ADMINS.description: Space-separated Telegram user IDs of admins (e.g. 123456789)

BIN_CHANNEL.description: Telegram channel ID where files are stored (e.g. -1001234567890). Bot must be admin.

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Telegram channel ID for bot logs (e.g. -1009876543210). Bot must be admin.

BOT_USERNAME.description: Your bot's username WITHOUT the @ symbol

FQDN.description: Your custom Cloudflare domain for stream links (e.g. stream.yourdomain.com). Leave blank to auto-use Heroku URL.

HAS_SSL.description: Set to true if your domain uses HTTPS (recommended, especially with Cloudflare)

NO_PORT.description: Set to true when using Cloudflare or any proxy (no port needed in URL)

APP_NAME.description: Your Heroku app name (e.g. my-rexbot). Used for self-ping to prevent sleeping. Auto-set if left blank.

SUPPORT_GROUP.description: Telegram group ID for support notifications

PREMIUM_LOGS.description: Telegram channel ID for premium user logs

VERIFIED_LOG.description: Telegram channel ID for verification logs

AUTH_CHANNEL.description: Space-separated channel IDs for force-subscribe (leave blank to disable)

PROTECT_CONTENT.description: Prevent users from forwarding bot messages? (true/false)

PING_INTERVAL.description: Seconds between self-pings to prevent Heroku sleep (1200 = 20 mins)
